equation: LMTD = ((T_hot_in - T_air_out) - (T_hot_out - T_air_in)) / ln((T_hot_in - T_air_out)/(T_hot_out - T_air_in))
runtime_or_training_boundary: runtime uses predicted temperatures and calibrated UA only

equation: Q_hx_pred = UA_HX * LMTD; T_hot_out = T_hot_in - Q_hx_pred/C_hot; T_air_out = T_air_in + Q_hx_pred/C_air
runtime_or_training_boundary: no imposed cooler duty term at runtime

equation: NTU = UA_HX/C_min; Cr = C_min/C_max; epsilon = (1 - exp(-NTU*(1-Cr))) / (1 - Cr*exp(-NTU*(1-Cr)))
runtime_or_training_boundary: requires admitted cold-side capacity from setup inputs
calibrated UA is fixed before held-out scoring

equation: minimize sum_train w_i * (Q_hx_target_i - Q_hx_pred_i(theta))^2; score heldout without refit
runtime_or_training_boundary: Q_hx_target is training evidence only, never a runtime input
